photos.title: Autocar Huillier Villard-de-Lans 1932.JPG
photos.description: Behind an establishment stands a group of six men next to a Delahaye's bus. On the ground floor of the establishment of one floor a headband bears the brand including “AUTO-CARS [BUS] D. HUILLIER”  and on right hand “SERVICE REGULIER GRENOBLE-PONT ROYANS MEAUDRE-AUTRANS” . There is also a signage like a flag with “AUTO-CARS D. HUILLIER SERVICES REGULIERS VILLARD de LANS-GRENOBLE LOCATION EXCURSIONS. TRANSPORTS” .On the bus there are “P.L.M.” and  “AUTO-CARS D.
